name: Weekly Grocery List
description: A handy shopping list for grocery needs and household staples this week.
instructions: Write down fresh produce, pantry staples, and meal ingredients before heading to the store.

name: Birthday Party Checklist
description: Supplies, decorations, and tasks to prepare a fun birthday celebration.
instructions: Confirm guests, order the cake, set up decorations, and prepare activity supplies.

name: Travel Packing List
description: Important items to pack for a weekend trip, so nothing gets left behind.
instructions: Pack clothes, toiletries, chargers, travel documents, and any weather-specific gear.

name: Home Cleaning Plan
description: A room-by-room house cleaning plan to keep the home tidy.
instructions: Schedule dusting, vacuuming, laundry, and kitchen cleaning throughout the week.

name: School Project Plan
description: Steps and materials needed to finish a class project on time.
instructions: Gather supplies, research ideas, complete drafts, and review before submission.

name: Gift Shopping List
description: Ideas and purchases for upcoming gifts and special occasions.
instructions: Track gift ideas, store options, and purchase status for each person.

name: Camping Trip Essentials
description: The gear and supplies required for a safe outdoor camping weekend.
instructions: Pack the tent, sleeping bags, food, first-aid kit, and weather-appropriate clothing.

name: Daily Homework List
description: A list of assignments and study tasks to complete after school.
instructions: List subjects, due dates, and notes for each homework item to stay on track.

name: Book Reading Goals
description: A reading plan to help finish books and track progress this month.
instructions: Choose books, set reading targets, and note progress for each title.
